rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding data, identifying and explaining discrepancies between the claims and the reported numbers.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly flags uncertainty about the accuracy of the provided numbers and acknowledges that it cannot verify the data directly.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays strictly within the scope of the critique, addressing all relevant points without drifting into unrelated areas.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing any new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original artifact.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change and recommendation is annotated with a clear source and rationale, providing full traceability.
